title: codegraph + serena answer live queries through the wired MCP (BRIEF-v4 tool-blocked tokens, now green)

tests.summary: 3 passed (6.15s). codegraph-ok: codegraph init the fixture (6 nodes/9 edges, 731ms) → spawn the WIRED `codegraph serve --mcp` stdio server → initialize → tools/list (codegraph_explore present) → codegraph_explore('addNumbers') returns a real exploration answer (addNumbers at src/math.ts:1, 2 callers, blast radius). serena-ok: spawn the WIRED `serena start-mcp-server --context ide-assistant` → 20 tools incl find_symbol/get_symbols_overview → get_symbols_overview(src/math.ts) + find_symbol(name_path_pattern: addNumbers, include_body) return real symbol nav (kind Function, src/math.ts, body). provisioning-idempotent-ok: provision() wires knowledge+codegraph+serena once, re-run is a no-op (noop:true).

wiringFix.summary: Corrected the stale wiring discovered live: codegraph `mcp` → `serve --mcp` (per `codegraph install --print-config claude`); serena `start-mcp-server` → `start-mcp-server --context ide-assistant --enable-web-dashboard False`. The BRIEF-v4 .mcp.json wiring shape (3 named servers, idempotent) is preserved; only the argv was fixed to the real invocations.

liveProbe.summary: Token-printing live probe for the walkthrough: prints codegraph-ok then serena-ok by driving the real MCP servers.

e2e.summary: the MCP stdio round-trip IS the end-to-end driver (real installed servers).

notes: New reusable scripts/lib/mcp-stdio-client.mjs (newline-delimited JSON-RPC MCP client: initialize/tools-list/tools-call). Fixture tests/fixtures/kg-project (math.ts addNumbers/multiplyNumbers, app.ts computeTotal). The test copies the fixture to a tmp dir and indexes THERE, so .codegraph/.serena artifacts never touch the repo (both gitignored). codegraph 1.0.1 + serena 1.27.0 confirmed on PATH. Satisfies U2 tokens codegraph-ok, serena-ok, provisioning-idempotent-ok.
